visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a teal turtleneck, a light grey quilted vest, and a black beret, stands in front of a glass-door freezer in a brightly lit warehouse store. She smiles at the camera and gestures towards the products inside. (2) The camera zooms in on a rectangular pizza box inside the freezer, showing a price tag of $249. (3) The scene shifts to the woman holding the pizza box, then to close-up shots of the cooked pizza. The pizza features a thick crust topped with ground meat, red cherry tomatoes, white cheese, and green basil leaves. (4) The woman is joined by another woman with dark hair wearing a lavender top in a home dining setting. They both hold slices of the pizza, showing the side profile to the camera, and speak with animated expressions. (5) Various close-ups of the pizza slices are shown as they eat and react. Colorful graphic overlays and stars appear around the pizza to emphasize its appeal. (6) Both women give a thumbs-up gesture and smile broadly, concluding their review in the same well-lit home environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 味道超炸裂!. [Slogan]: 泰式打拋豬風味披薩. (2) [Subtitle]: 這是最新出的披薩. (3) [Subtitle]: 然後一樣是在他們的那個食物區. (4) [Subtitle]: 上次我們有吃那個瑪格麗特覺得超好吃. (5) [Subtitle]: 我們這一次看看這個泰式打拋豬值不值得. (6) [Slogan]: 打拋豬風味披薩 249元. (7) [Subtitle]: 我們切成6片. (8) [Subtitle]: 所以一大片是41塊錢. (9) [Subtitle]: 你們看側面那個豬肉餡. [Variety]: 高到堆起來. (10) [Subtitle]: 那我們剛剛試吃完以後. (11) [Variety]: 十分 非常值得買. (12) [Subtitle]: 還跟上次的瑪格麗特一樣厲害. (13) [Subtitle]: 除了餅皮的口感很Q彈之外呢. (14) [Subtitle]: 它上面的豬非常的人味. [Variety]: 👍. (15) [Subtitle]: 口感也很好不會乾巴巴的. (16) [Variety]: 非常夠量. [Subtitle]: 起司也放得非常夠量. (17) [Subtitle]: 然後在那個非常鹹香的豬肉餡. (18) [Subtitle]: 又可以咬到番茄小番茄清爽的感覺. (19) [Subtitle]: 搭配起來十分的有水準. (20) [Subtitle]: 沒錯最重要是九層塔整個入在裡面. (21) [Subtitle]: 以及紅醬底讓它吃起來更清爽. (22) [Subtitle]: 非常推薦大家買來吃吃看. (23) [Subtitle]: 絕對不要錯過哦. (24) [Subtitle]: 打拋豬披薩一定要試哦. (25) [Variety]: 味道超乎預期.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appear throughout the video reviewing the food.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a teal top, a grey vest, and a black beret. The second woman is wearing a lavender puff-sleeve top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scene is inside a Costco warehouse store with tall industrial shelves and refrigerated food aisles. The subsequent scene is a tidy indoor living/dining room with a wooden table and a neutral-colored sofa in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and bright acoustic guitar-led pop BGM plays throughout. A young female voice speaks with high energy, clear articulation, and a friendly tone. (2) A subtle 'ding' sound effect triggers to emphasize a visual text overlay. (3) The first voice continues, punctuated by occasional short 'pop' sound effects as graphics appear. (4) A second female voice joins in, mirroring the high arousal and positive valence of the first speaker. They speak quickly, creating a dynamic conversational flow. (5) The music stays consistent in volume underneath the dialogue, maintaining a cheerful atmosphere until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Discovery -> Context -> Detailed Taste Test -> Evaluation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a food review aimed at promoting a new 'Thai Basil Pork Flavor Pizza' from Costco. The creators describe the purchasing experience, the price point, and then provide a detailed sensory review of the toppings and texture to recommend it to their audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features specific branding (Costco), highlights a new product arrival, and provides a very positive, structured review typical of influencer endorsements.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows a high-density information layout common in short-form social media reviews, using vibrant text and enthusiastic vocal delivery to maintain viewer engagement.
